description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This piece should be a key style on your wish list with its design aesthetic. Wear this with printed garments in your ensemble to showcase your style understanding. Height: 29 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth:  13 cmFaux crocodile leatherette texturing on the synthetic leatherette upper, with matted styling on the front and stitch detail with synthetic leatherette on the sidesA flap with a metallic foldover clasp to secure the compartments insideOne main zippered compartment with two pouches and a zippered pocket inside inside One zippered pocket on the backTwo handles and one adjustable and detachable shoulder strapBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
